What We Covered In This Module:
✓ Elements Of The Customer Captivation Offer!
✓ Constructing The Customer Captivation Offer!
✓ Presenting Your Customer Captivation Offer!
✓ Building Your Customer Captivation Page
Module 4

What To Do Now:
1. 	Write Your Word-For-Word VSL Script!
2. 	Record The Audio For Your VSL!
3. 	Create Your VSL Slides (from your Script)!
4. 	Record (and render) Your VSL!
5. 	Upload Your VSL To Your Streaming Service!
6. 	Create Your Customer Captivation Offer Page
